create.prompt:
Use case: YouTube Shorts part 2 of AI truce story
Primary request: vertical war-room shot where human command slams a physical kill-switch and both AI holograms freeze, then a green negotiation channel opens between them
Scene/background: same secure command center, neon maps hovering, hands on consoles only as silhouettes
Subject: red AegisNet sigil and blue HelixMind sigil paused mid-glitch; human switch flips to amber; a green tunnel appears labeled TREATY CHANNEL
Action: beat 1 (0-4s) human hand flips heavy kill-switch, red warning bars drop; beat 2 (4-8s) AI sigils unfreeze slightly as a green line bridges them; beat 3 (8-12s) treaty channel stabilizes with code flowing both directions
Camera: whip-pan from switch to holograms, then slow dolly as the green channel forms
Lighting/mood: tension easing, reds cooling to amber and teal
Color palette: red, amber, teal, charcoal, black
Style/format: glitchy UI overlays, volumetric light rays, clean space for captions, no baked-in subtitles
Timing/beats: 3 beats across 12 seconds: human clamp, channel opens, stabilizes
Audio: tense pulse that softens when channel opens, no vocals
Text (verbatim): "TREATY CHANNEL" above the green bridge
Constraints: no real faces, no guns, PG, no logos
Avoid: soldiers, flags, blood, smoke, realistic humans
